text.title: Freelance Marketplace Platform Tradeoffs Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Freelance Marketplace Platform Tradeoffs. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Freelancer picks platform with lowest fee; signs exclusivity; locked out of higher-rate clients.
antipattern.root-cause: five-axis-score rule violated; only fee evaluated.
antipattern.fix: Re-score on all five axes; renegotiate or churn out by exclusivity-clause exit window.

antipattern.symptom: Specialist at $200/hr lists on Upwork (median $40/hr); 4 months zero leads; switches to Toptal.
antipattern.root-cause: rate-band-fit rule violated; platform median misfit.
antipattern.fix: Match rate band to platform median; switch if mismatch >= 30%.

antipattern.symptom: Freelancer 100% revenue from Upwork; account suspended; income drops to zero overnight.
antipattern.fix: Build secondary presence (Contra brand-page or direct LinkedIn) BEFORE platform risk materializes.
